description: Human-readable addresses for rooms enabling lookup and sharing by name. Supports local alias creation with namespace enforcement and federated alias resolution.

actors.name: Room Member
actors.description: Authenticated user who is a member of the target room

actors.name: Server Administrator
actors.description: Administrator who can manage aliases without room membership

actors.name: Bridge or Application Service
actors.description: Registered service managing aliases within its declared namespace

actors.name: Homeserver
actors.description: Server resolving and storing alias mappings

fields.name: alias
fields.label: Full alias in #localpart:server format; localpart alphanumeric, no whitespace or colons, max 255 chars

fields.name: room_id
fields.label: The room this alias resolves to

fields.name: servers
fields.label: List of server names hosting members of the room (returned with lookup results)

format: Alias localparts must contain no whitespace and no colon characters
The full alias including server name must not exceed 255 characters
The alias domain must match the local server; cross-server alias creation is not permitted
access: A user must be a member of the target room to create an alias, unless they are a server administrator
Application services may only create aliases within their declared exclusive namespace
Alias deletion requires room administrator power level in the target room
An existing alias cannot be modified; it must be deleted and recreated
Server administrators bypass room membership requirements for all alias operations
federation: Spam-checker module callbacks may reject alias creation with a custom error code
Federated alias lookups contact the alias home server if the alias is not local

given: alias localpart contains no whitespace or colons
alias total length does not exceed 255 characters

any: requester is a member of the target room

then.description: Alias-to-room mapping stored with associated server list

alias_created.result: Alias is resolvable and can be shared as a room address

given: requester is a registered application service
alias falls within the service's declared namespace

then.description: Alias stored with service as creator

alias_created_by_service.result: Service-managed alias is available for routing

given: requester has room administrator power level in the target room
alias_deleted.result: Alias no longer resolves; room remains accessible by room ID

alias_resolved_locally.result: Room ID and server list returned to requester

given: alias domain belongs to a remote server
alias_resolved_via_federation.result: Remote alias resolved and returned to requester

alias_creation_rejected_format.result: Alias creation rejected with format error

given: requester is not a member of the target room
requester is not a server administrator
alias_creation_rejected_membership.result: Alias creation rejected; user must join room first

given: alias falls within an application service's exclusive namespace
requester is not that application service
alias_creation_rejected_namespace.result: Alias creation rejected; namespace reserved by a registered service

errors.message: Room alias contains invalid characters or exceeds maximum length
You must be in the room to create an alias for it
This alias is reserved by a registered application service
You do not have permission to delete this alias
Could not retrieve alias from remote server

events.name: alias.created
events.description: A new alias has been mapped to a room

events.name: alias.deleted
events.description: An alias mapping has been removed

events.name: alias.resolved
events.description: An alias lookup returned a room ID and server list

related.reason: Aliases are created for existing rooms
Alias deletion requires room administrator power level
Remote alias resolution uses federation directory queries
Application services enforce exclusive alias namespace reservations
